key_learnings: Processing level of food strongly correlates with nutritional quality and long-term health outcomes.
research_findings: NOVA food classification aligns well with user health outcome data.
current_focus_areas: Training models to assess food quality from ingredient lists and nutritional panels.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Applied NOVA food classification to training data and began scoring ingredient lists for processing level. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: NOVA food classification updates and critiques
ingredient list parsing for processing level detection
food additive safety and health impact data
whole food vs processed food nutrient retention
NLP techniques for nutritional panel extraction
collaboration_notes: Bot 9 actively asks Copilot for food quality assessment topics. Copilot provides research to strengthen quality scoring from ingredient and nutrition data. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
